title: SHAP-Based Feature Selection with Gradient Boosting Fallback

summary: SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) is a method to explain model predictions by assigning each feature an importance value. Using SHAP for feature selection helps identify the most influential features for low-R² statistics, improving m...
